effects.name: Kamish Turns
effects.effect: Kamish takes up to three turns each round. He can't take turns consecutively. Additionally, he can use three triggered actions in a round while he isn't dazed.

effects.name: End Effect
effects.effect: At the end of each of his turns, Kamish can take 20 damage to end up to two effects on him that can be ended by a saving throw. This damage can't be reduced in any way.

effects.tier1: 16 damage; M < 4 the target loses 1d3 Recoveries
effects.tier2: 22 damage; M < 5 the target loses 1d3 Recoveries
effects.tier3: 26 damage; M < 6 prone and the target loses 1d3 Recoveries

effects.name: Effect
effects.effect: Kamish shifts up to 2 squares between striking each target.
Kamish can strike one additional target for each Malice spent.
